allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: add initial bucket-db design document

Add comprehensive design document for BucketDB v0.1.0, covering:
- Architecture and data organization
- API design with TypeScript type safety
- Query execution and indexing strategy
- Concurrency control with optimistic locking
- Monorepo structure with Bun
- NPM publishing strategy
- Development roadmap
EOF
\)")
Bash(git commit -m "chore: initialize monorepo with Bun workspaces")
Bash(git commit -m "feat: add core type definitions and interfaces")
Bash(git commit -m "feat: implement MemoryStorageAdapter for testing")
Bash(git commit -m "feat: implement query evaluation engine")
Bash(git commit -m "feat: implement index shard manager with query support")
Bash(git commit -m "feat: implement Collection with CRUD operations")
Bash(git commit -m "feat: implement BucketDB main class and exports")
Bash(git commit -m "feat: implement S3 storage adapter")
Bash(git commit -m "feat: implement OSS storage adapter")
Bash(git commit -m "docs: add README and basic usage example")
Bash(git commit -m "chore: prepare packages for publishing")
